sections.paragraph:
m. i.q. רְעוּת No. 2, desire, study, striving. Ecc 2:22, רַעְיֹון לִבֹּו “the striving of his heart.” רַעְיֹון רוּחַ striving after wind, vain desire, Ecc 1:17 4:16 . Root רָעָה No. 3.

רעיון

m. Chald. thought, Dan 4:16 5:6 , 10 7:28 used of night visions, Dan 2:29, 30 . Root רְעָה to think.
